text:
Sure thing.

In a quiet town nestled among whispering pines.

Here lived an old owl.

Everyone knew owls.

But no one cared much about them.

Except Owl.

He cared a lot.

Perhaps because he loved flying.

Or maybe he just loved solitude.

One rainy afternoon Owl thought,.

Why soar so?

Why not just hang?

At Owl’s favorite spot.

That smelled like damp pine.

And thought.

I think I love you.

You think??

Just say Owl…

Just ow.







That’s my owl.

So owl did.

Just Owl.

And owl soared.
